notes: Comment on someone (often a child or pet) growing fast. 'cepet' is informal of 'cepat' (fast). VERIFY WITH GIRLFRIEND: this is the contrasting case to the subhanallah/case_002 child-growth fixture — confirms masyaallah is the more conventional choice for marveling at human/animal growth, with subhanallah reserved for natural phenomena. If correct, the subhanallah/case_002 fixture should migrate here in a follow-up.
